case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HARLYN MOISES CANCHE COOL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOL, HARLYN MOISES CANCHE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOL, HARLYN MOISES CANCHE $1,124.44 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,209.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,124.44 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COOL, HARLYN MOISES CANCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
